title: Saat Paake Bandha
desc: Dushtu, a sweet but misunderstood girl, worries if her life partner will accept her the way she is. She marries Raja, who tries to keep her happy and satisfied.

title: Parineeta
desc: Rayan is disturbed to discover that Parul has to wed Rik to protect the family business, yet continues to deny his feelings for her. Meanwhile, the Basu family schemes to unite Parul and Rayan.

title: Joyar Bhata
desc: Uji and Nisha, two sisters, share a close relationship, but are polar opposites. Later, when Uji's marriage turns troublesome, Nisha steps out to seek revenge.

title: Joyar Bhata
desc: Uji and Nisha, two sisters, share a close relationship, but are polar opposites. Later, when Uji's marriage turns troublesome, Nisha steps out to seek revenge.

title: Rannaghar
desc: The host shares the recipes of a variety of mouthwatering dishes and demonstrates the steps involved in their preparation.

title: Didi No 1
desc: Participants come together to celebrate the spirit of womanhood in a unique multi-round competition to win various prizes.

title: Saat Paake Bandha
desc: Dushtu, a sweet but misunderstood girl, worries if her life partner will accept her the way she is. She marries Raja, who tries to keep her happy and satisfied.

title: Besh Korechhi Prem Korechhi
desc: Swayam, a quiet musician from humble origins, and Jui, a wealthy but guarded city girl, clash initially but gradually fall in love amid personal struggles and musical passion.

title: Chirodini Tumi Je Amar
desc: Arya, a rich man, marries lively Aparna from a simple family. Soon, his dark past and her strange visions lead them into a dangerous mystery that could change everything.

title: Kusum
desc: Adored by her community, Kusum, a vivacious young woman, is known for her quick wit and captivating personality, as she aspires to win the approval of her idol, Indrani Ganguly.

title: Tare Dhori Dhori Mone Kori
desc: An ascetic man in the ancient city of Nabadwip embarks on a journey of spirituality. However, when he crosses paths with a young woman, he yearns for family life.

title: Parineeta
desc: Mehul falls in love with her tutor, Babai, who is an exceptional student. Her world turns upside down when she hears the news of his suicide.

title: Joyar Bhata
desc: Taijul finds a newlywed bride near a river, traveling to her in-laws. Bandits attack their boat; Taijul must decide if he can find her family.

title: Kone Dekha Alo
desc: Anubhab and Kinkini try to bring Lajbonti home, face her father's rejection, and consider legal action, while Bonolata claims Sudeb is her cousin.

title: Anandi
desc: Anandi, an aspiring doctor from a lower-middle-class family, begins working as a nurse due to her father's illness. However, things take a turn when she crosses paths with her idol, Dr Adidev Lahiri.

desc: Someshwar tells Botuk's sons about sisters. He then asks Hori Kaka about a groom for Ratna. Parthasarathi wants Parvati to come home from her medical studies in the city.
